hero_backgrounds.label: Hero Backgrounds
hero_backgrounds.description: Wide cinematic backgrounds for hero sections

presets.label: Abstract Gradient Flow
presets.prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic abstract gradient flowing background, deep indigo to electric cyan to warm amber color transition, smooth organic fluid dynamics, volumetric light rays piercing through ethereal mist, 8K resolution, commercial landing page hero, hyper-clean modern aesthetic
presets.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, blurry, noisy, low quality, pixelated

presets.label: Aerial Nature Vista
presets.prompt: Breathtaking aerial drone shot of turquoise ocean meeting white sand beach, dramatic golden hour lighting, long shadows across dunes, crystal clear water with visible reef patterns, cinematic wide-angle panorama, commercial travel website hero image, ultra-sharp 8K detail
presets.negative_prompt: people, text, watermark, overexposed, blurry, artificial

presets.label: Minimal Tech Surface
presets.prompt: Ultra-minimal technology-inspired background surface, subtle geometric mesh pattern in gunmetal and silver, soft gaussian light bloom from top-left, premium matte material texture, clean modern SaaS website hero, studio-lit product stage aesthetic
presets.negative_prompt: text, watermark, busy, cluttered, colorful, noisy

product_shots.label: Product Photography
product_shots.description: Studio-quality product shots on clean backgrounds

presets.label: Floating Product Minimal
presets.prompt: Premium product floating in mid-air on pure white infinite studio background, soft shadow underneath, three-point studio lighting setup, commercial product photography, sharp focus, clean ecommerce aesthetic, professional packshot
presets.negative_prompt: text, watermark, blurry, dark background, messy, reflections

presets.label: Lifestyle Desk Scene
presets.prompt: Top-down flat lay product arrangement on warm oak desk surface, minimalist accessories scattered around, soft natural window light from left side, lifestyle brand photography, Instagram-worthy composition, shallow depth of field edges
presets.negative_prompt: text, watermark, cluttered, dark, blurry, unrealistic colors

lifestyle.label: Lifestyle & Brand
lifestyle.description: Aspirational lifestyle imagery for brand marketing

presets.label: Morning Cafe Moment
presets.prompt: Warm cozy cafe interior at golden morning hour, sunlight streaming through large windows, steaming artisan coffee on marble table, fresh pastry nearby, soft bokeh background with blurred patrons, lifestyle brand photography, inviting atmosphere
presets.negative_prompt: text, watermark, faces, identifiable people, dark, blurry, low quality

presets.label: Outdoor Adventure Scene
presets.prompt: Epic mountain landscape at sunrise, misty valleys below, hiking trail winding through alpine meadows with wildflowers, dramatic sky with golden clouds, adventure brand photography, aspirational outdoor lifestyle, ultra-wide cinematic composition
presets.negative_prompt: text, watermark, people, blurry, oversaturated, artificial

abstract_decorative.label: Abstract & Decorative
abstract_decorative.description: Bold abstract patterns for backgrounds and accents

presets.label: Luxury Marble Texture
presets.prompt: Macro photograph of premium white Calacatta marble surface with dramatic gold and grey veining, studio lighting highlighting natural stone texture, luxury interior design material, high-end brand background, ultra-sharp detail
presets.negative_prompt: text, watermark, blurry, low quality, fake looking, plastic

presets.label: Neon Light Waves
presets.prompt: Dynamic flowing neon light waves against dark background, electric blue and hot magenta energy streams intertwining, smooth long-exposure light painting effect, futuristic tech brand aesthetic, cyberpunk-inspired abstract art, vibrant glowing trails
presets.negative_prompt: text, watermark, blurry, noisy, pixelated, faces, objects

icons_illustrations.label: Icons & Illustrations
icons_illustrations.description: Clean vector-style icons and spot illustrations

presets.label: 3D Glossy Icon
presets.prompt: Single 3D glossy app icon centered on transparent-style light background, smooth rounded corners, vibrant gradient surface from electric blue to purple, subtle reflection on bottom, professional UI icon design, Apple-style polish
presets.negative_prompt: text, multiple icons, watermark, blurry, flat, matte

presets.label: Isometric Illustration
presets.prompt: Clean isometric illustration of a modern workspace setup, computer monitor showing dashboard, desk accessories, potted plant, warm color palette with soft shadows, vector art style, SaaS website illustration, friendly and professional
presets.negative_prompt: text, watermark, photorealistic, blurry, messy, dark
